channel.title: Yorkshire Gigs Events
channel.description: Upcoming Yorkshire events in the Gigs category.

item.title: Setting The Stage: 70 Years Of The Eurovision Song Contest
item.description: Celebrating 70 years of Eurovision at the National Science and Media Museum. Go behind the sequins of the world’s largest live music event and discover how the magic really happens.
item.location: National Science and Media Museum, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1NQ
item.ify:location: National Science and Media Museum, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1NQ
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Live Music: Dan Loops
item.location: 16 - 24 Darley Street Kitchen, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3HH
item.ify:location: 16 - 24 Darley Street Kitchen, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3HH
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Tom Jones
item.description: Tom Jones + STONE FOUNDATION Music icon Tom Jones has announced his return to Halifax this summer for a huge outdoor headline show as part of his 2026 Come Gather Round tour. The legendary Welsh singer will take to the stage at TK Maxx Presents Live at The Piece Hall on Saturday 25 July. He... \n
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.ify:location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.dc:creator: The Piece Hall

item.title: Yorkshire Day at Bradford Industrial Museum
item.description: Yorkshire Day at Bradford Industrial Museum brings live music, Morris dancing, family activities, a visiting horse, and the vibrant Made By Many Hands Makers Market together for a lively summer celebration.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: The Total Stone Roses
item.description: The Total Stone Roses bring the sound and spirit of Manchester’s iconic band to Underground Bradford.
item.location: The Underground, 9 Duke Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3QR

item.title: The Music of James Bond
item.description: A thrilling orchestral tribute to the iconic music of James Bond, performed by world‑class musicians and vocalists at Bradford Cathedral.
item.location: Bradford Cathedral, 1 Stott Hill, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 4EH
item.ify:location: Bradford Cathedral, 1 Stott Hill, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 4EH
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Holly Johnson
item.description: Holly Johnson + ABC & HEAVEN 17 Singer-songwriter and 80s icon Holly Johnson will bring a taste of Hollywood to Halifax as he headlines a spectacular night next summer. The former Frankie Goes To Hollywood frontman and successful solo artist will headline TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Saturday 15 August, j
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.title: Public Service Broadcasting
item.description: Public Service Broadcasting + THE BIG MOON Cinematic rock pioneers Public Service Broadcasting are today revealed as the 42nd and final headliners for TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall 2026. The London-based four-piece who blend stirring historic audio narratives with rock, electronics and orchestration bring the
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.title: Bastille
item.description: Bastille + NECTAR WOODE Multi-platinum selling indie pop band Bastille is the latest headline artist heading to Halifax next summer. The four-piece, fronted by vocalist Dan Smith, alongside Kyle Simmons on keys, bass and guitarist Will Farquarson and drummer Chris ‘Woody’ Wood will play TK Maxx presents Live at The Pie
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.title: Scissor Sisters
item.description: Scissor Sisters + BIMINI & THE HIDDEN CAMERAS Halifax will sizzle next summer as Scissor Sisters are bringing their iconic glam-pop spectacle to the town. The multi-award-winning American pop band will headline TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Sunday 9 August for a night of high-energy anthems, dazzling perfo
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.title: Opera North: Little Listeners at the NCEM – Mini Magic Flute
item.description: Take the family on a magical musical journey inspired by Mozart's beloved opera, The Magic Flute. A trio of opera singers and an accordionist bring to life a Prince's quest to find a Princess, where nothing is quite what it seems! Meet a cast of fantastical characters, from a charming bird-catcher to a fearsome dragon,
item.location: National Centre for Early Music (NCEM), St Margaret’s Church York YO1 9TL
item.ify:location: National Centre for Early Music (NCEM), St Margaret’s Church York YO1 9TL
item.dc:creator: Little Vikings
